scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @controle-gado/domain && npm run build -w @controle-gado/shared && npm run build -w @controle-gado/application && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test -w @controle-gado/domain && npm run test -w api
